channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-05
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The `scienceverse/metacheck` and `MicheleNuijten/statcheck` projects have both received updates, with `metacheck` improving its OSF download functionality and `statcheck` integrating changes from its remote repository. Meanwhile, `giladfeldman/docpluck` and `giladfeldman/escicheck` have made notable fixes and updates, including resolving issues with text loss and syncing changes from `escicheckapp`. Additionally, `Davidvandijcke/coarse` has re-enabled Fable 5 in its model picker, and other projects like `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` and `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` have made smaller but important changes, such as revising validation notes and adding Chrome Webstore links. These connections and progress demonstrate the collaborative spirit and dedication of our community to advancing open-source research tools.

77 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck31 commits
metacheck18 commits
regcheck18 commits
escicheck6 commits
statcheck2 commits

item.title: metacheck: 13 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was the focus of the recent work, with updates to the OSF download functionality, as noted in the commit message "updates osf download". Additionally, the `data_check` branch saw "updates to functions, fix bugs", which suggests that existing functions were modified and bugs were resolved. The `data_check` branch also received changes described as "improvements", although the specifics of these changes are not detailed in the commit message. The work was done by Lakens, who made these changes to the `data_check` branch on July 5, 2026. No other branches were affected by these commits.

13 commit(s) today:

  • 2615ab2 [data_check] updates osf download — Lakens
  • 58122ed [data_check] updates to functions, fix bugs — Lakens
  • ad4cb14 [data_check] improvements — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the remote repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, administrative updates were made, as described in the commit message "admin updates". No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages, indicating that all recent work was focused on `feature-non-apa-newer`. The commit messages do not provide details on the specific administrative updates that were made.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
